new_classes.label_en: Other whisky in large containers > 2 l (CN 2208 30 79)
new_classes.label_de: Anderer Whisky in Behältnissen mit mehr als 2 l (KN 2208 30 79)
new_classes.definition_en: Whisky in containers holding more than 2 litres that is not any variety of Scotch whisky (single malt, blended malt, single grain, blended grain, or blended Scotch) and not whisky with soda water. Covers non-Scotch whiskies (Bourbon, Irish, Canadian, Japanese, etc.) in large containers.

coverage_explanation: WhiskyQuality + LargeContainer are sufficient conditions. Scotch whiskies are excluded naturally via producedBy some ScotchProcess (occurs_in ScotlandSite). Complement restrictions on Scotch classes omitted deliberately: those classes have no container restriction so their intersection with OtherWhiskyLargeContainer would be non-empty, forcing TBox inconsistency.
